---
title: "RenderBrains Documentation"
description: "Official knowledge base for the RenderBrains rendering engine and toolset."
---

Welcome to the **RenderBrains** documentation.

RenderBrains is a real-time rendering engine and toolset built for high-performance graphics. This site is the team's shared, versioned knowledge base — covering architecture decisions, developer guides, and technical references.

---

## Sections

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### [Guides](guides/index.qmd)
Step-by-step tutorials and how-to documentation for working with RenderBrains tools and workflows.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### [Architecture](architecture/index.qmd)
Detailed explanations of the rendering engine's internal systems, design patterns, and subsystem interactions.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### [References](references/index.qmd)
API references, configuration schemas, enumeration tables, and lookup material.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### [Decisions](decisions/index.qmd)
Architecture Decision Records (ADRs) tracking significant technical choices and their rationale.
:::

:::

---

## Contributing

Documentation is authored in Obsidian (`vault/`) and published via Quarto (`docs/`). See the [README](https://github.com/renderbrains/renderbrains-docs#contributing) for the full authoring workflow.
